info.title: liquidpreview
info.description: Allows live preview of Liquid templates, specifically designed for the Azure cloud services.

options.name: --template
options.description: : Relative path to the .liquid template source file

options.name: --content
options.description: : Relative path to the XML or JSON data source file

options.name: --output
options.description: : Relative path to the output result file

options.name: --watch
options.description: : Switch parameter to enable file watcher and produce output on file update

options.name: --help
options.description: : Switch parameter to show this information
